title: cytherea borealis
intro: Cytherea borealis, also known as the sea lavender, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for treating skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cytherea borealis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
